notes: Generated with built-in image generation after inspecting the cozy Sushi Seal four-form sheet, the base Tide Recon Drone horror sprite, the sushi bite particle, and the cozy defeat still.
The source sheet contains six left-to-right subjects: four evolution stages, one static sensor-mine particle, and one disabled wreck defeat still.
The attack particle prompt explicitly avoided speed lines, trails, directional smear, and motion blur so it reads as a static object.

Background was removed with the imagegen remove_chroma_key.py helper, then subjects were sliced by inspected x-ranges. The four evolution stages use staged target sizes so progression remains visible in-game.
